_meta.description: Hiring signal data: job posting volumes, role demand trends, campus hiring
_meta.how_to_update: Track naukri.com/jobs/bangalore?category=it monthly. Count postings for each role category, update yoy_change_pct.

job_postings.label: Manual QA / Testing
job_postings.description: Most at-risk category — test automation and AI replacing manual testers fast
job_postings.note: Automated testing tools and AI-driven QA platforms directly replacing this category

job_postings.label: L1 / L2 IT Support
job_postings.description: BPO + IT helpdesk roles. AI chatbots and RAG systems replacing first-line support.
job_postings.note: Large BPO clients deploying LLM-based Tier-1 support. Tier-2 next.

job_postings.label: Fresher IT (0–2 yrs)
job_postings.description: Entry-level software engineering, coding, and IT generalist roles
job_postings.note: Biggest volume drop is in entry-level roles. Senior roles relatively stable.

job_postings.label: Data Engineering
job_postings.description: Data pipelines, warehousing, ETL. Growing but evolving with AI tooling.
job_postings.note: Demand growing but tooling is shifting. dbt, Spark, LLM-powered pipelines.

job_postings.label: AI / ML Engineering
job_postings.description: Model training, MLOps, LLM integration, AI product engineering
job_postings.note: Fastest growing category in BLR. Still requires significant upskilling.

job_postings.label: Cloud / Cybersecurity
job_postings.note: Strong demand. Cloud migration and security complexity is AI-resistant.

jd_signals.note: % of all BLR tech JDs mentioning AI tools as requirement. Up ~4x in 2 years.

companies.name: TCS
companies.note: Significant drop from FY24 peak. Fresher intake being replaced by experienced + AI tools.

companies.name: Infosys
companies.note: Offer delays common. Many FY25 offers joined late or were rescinded.

companies.name: HCL Tech
companies.note: Products division stable, services intake down.
